svg.text: X: producer logical CPU · Y: consumer logical CPU · Z/depth: scalar or fixed batch width · color: median M items/s (one global scale)
Exploded layers prevent occlusion. Hover voxel for exact path; click legend mode to isolate depth slice.
Overview limited to first 16 of 128 logical CPUs. Re-run with --3d-max-cpus 0 for all CPUs.
